dataset: PDB 5nrl spliceosome, 50 volumes, grid=128, voxel=4.25A, B=80, rot=10deg, noise_level=0.1
notes: Per-function baseline for isolated pipeline function regression tests. Each function was run step-by-step using ~/recovar (conda env 'recovar'). Intermediates from each step are saved as .npy files for use as standardized inputs in subsequent tests.
